calibration.coordinate_system: image pixels, origin top-left, y increases DOWNWARD
calibration.court_convention: origin front-left floor corner viewed from back-wall camera; x right 0-21; y toward back wall 0-32

lines.description: lower edge of the out line (ball at or above this is OUT)
lines.name: out_line_lower_edge

lines.description: top edge of the tin (ball at or below this is DOWN)
lines.name: tin_top_edge
